title: angelica integrifolia
intro: Angelica integrifolia, also known as Wholeleaf Angelica or Angelica sinensis, is a perennial plant native to eastern Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Angelica integrifolia include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Angelica integrifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
